demos.briefing: SAQUEI — SaaS B2C BR. Tráfego atual: Google Ads + Meta Ads para landing R$ 29 relatório. Quer escalar com newsletter.
demos.reasoning: SAQUEI is a B2C SaaS in Brazil with a low-ticket entry point (R$ 29 report). Current paid traffic (Google + Meta) drives cold leads to a landing page. The goal is to scale via newsletter, which requires: (1) building an email list from paid traffic, (2) nurturing with valuable content to establish trust, (3) upselling higher-tier reports/subscriptions, (4) retaining via ongoing insights. The funnel must optimize for low CAC recovery and high email engagement, given the modest entry price. Newsletter becomes the retention + expansion lever.
stages: Paid ads (Google + Meta) → landing page R$ 29 report
Email capture — lead magnet or free report preview
Newsletter nurture — weekly insights + case studies (D7-D30)
demos.conversion_thresholds: Ads→landing 100% → email capture 38% → report delivery 92% → newsletter open 45% → premium upsell 8.5% → referral 12%
copy_hooks: Hook ads: 'Descubra quanto você REALMENTE gasta por mês — relatório gratuito em 2 min'
Hook email capture: 'Seu relatório está pronto — confirme o email para receber'
Hook welcome: 'Os 3 gastos que a maioria não vê (e como cortar R$ 500+)'
Hook newsletter: 'Semana passada, 1.2K pessoas economizaram R$ 18K — veja como'
Hook upsell: 'Relatórios ilimitados + alertas automáticos — R$ 99/mês'
demos.automations: landing_submit → instant_email_delivery + welcome_sequence (3 emails D0-D3). email_open_3x → nurture_newsletter_add. report_view_time_5min → premium_upsell_email. no_open_7days → re_engagement_push. premium_signup → onboard_call_trigger + community_invite.

demos.briefing: LUCAS/LUSOconta — SaaS contabilidade PT. Tráfego: LinkedIn outbound + referral contabilistas. Pricing 297€/mês.
demos.reasoning: LUCAS/LUSOconta targets Portuguese accountants and small business owners via LinkedIn outbound and referral channels. At €297/mth, this is a mid-market SaaS with high consideration cycles (B2B accounting software). The funnel must address: (1) awareness via LinkedIn credibility + peer validation, (2) education on compliance/time-savings ROI, (3) trial/demo conversion with low friction, (4) onboarding success to prevent churn, (5) expansion via referral loops. Key metrics: LinkedIn CTR ~2-3%, demo-to-trial ~35-45%, trial-to-paid ~20-25%, referral velocity post-activation.
stages: LinkedIn outbound + referral awareness (credibility + social proof)
Lead magnet download (compliance checklist or tax calendar)
demos.conversion_thresholds: Outbound→lead magnet 18% → demo request 28% → trial start 42% → paid conversion 22% → referral activation 35%
copy_hooks: 'Contabilidade portuguesa em 3 cliques — sem papelada, sem erros de IRS'
'Economize 12h/semana em reconciliação — veja como 400+ contabilistas já fazem'
'Teste grátis 14 dias: compliance automática + relatórios em tempo real'
'Seus clientes já usam LUCAS — refira e ganhe 3 meses grátis'
'Auditoria fiscal integrada + notificações de prazos — tudo num dashboard'
demos.automations: linkedin_click → email sequence (day 0: value prop, day 3: social proof case study, day 5: demo CTA). lead_magnet_download → nurture drip (compliance tips + webinar invite). demo_no_show → SMS reminder + rescheduling link. trial_signup → onboarding email + video walkthrough + day 7 check-in. trial_end_inactive → win-back sequence (discount offer + success story). paid_signup → referral incentive email + partner portal access. referral_conversion → both parties receive 3-month credit.

signature.instructions:
Design a multi-stage marketing funnel for the business described.

Must specify the stages (typically 4-6), conversion thresholds, key
copy hooks, CTAs per stage, and automation triggers.

fields.description: Business, product, target, pricing, current traffic source.
Funnel stages in order, each with name + purpose.
Per-stage conversion benchmark (% expected). One per stage.
Headline / hook per stage (3-5 of them).
